title: GetResponse vs Loops (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: GetResponse vs Loops: compare pricing, features, and real use cases to find the right email tool.
intro: Choosing between GetResponse and Loops comes down to your specific use case. GetResponse is built for online course creators and webinar hosts, while Loops targets SaaS companies sending product and lifecycle emails.

comparison_table.tool_a: Online Course Creators And Webinar Hosts
comparison_table.tool_b: Saas Companies Sending Product And Lifecycle Emails

choose_a_if: You are primarily focused on online course creators and webinar hosts
choose_b_if: You are primarily focused on SaaS companies sending product and lifecycle emails

faq.a: It depends on your use case. GetResponse wins for online course creators and webinar hosts, while Loops is stronger for SaaS companies sending product and lifecycle emails.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, GetResponse or Loops?
faq.a: GetResponse starts at a lower price point. Pricing scales with subscriber count so total cost depends on your list size.

faq.q: Can I switch from Loops to GetResponse?
faq.a: Yes, switching is possible. Most platforms support CSV import/export. Plan time to recreate automations and templates.
